title: Frozen Candidate
description: Per the task's canonical freeze model (section 10): a snapshot of exactly what would render, identified by hashes of every canonical input. Proof approval references a frozen_candidate by hash; full render is only permitted from the exact approved frozen_candidate -- any changed hash invalidates the approval.

approval_version.description: Marks which verification scheme (scripts/orvyq_verify_approval.mjs) this candidate expects to be checked under. Optional and absent on frozen candidates produced before hash-hardened approval verification existed -- their approval remains valid under the original approved===true + frozen_candidate_hash check they were reviewed against.

renderer_commit_sha.description: git SHA of the last commit that touched templates/remotion, independent of source_commit_sha (the checkout commit) -- lets renderer drift be detected even when other project data changes without a renderer change.

narration_sha256.description: sha256 of the exact narration audio this candidate's edit plan was timed against (voice/narration_status.json's narration_sha256 for full mode).

pause_map_hash.description: sha256 of direction/editorial_pause_map.json's real file content.

script_hash.description: sha256 of voice/voice_script.txt's real file content.

mode.description: "candidate" is the live value going forward. "proof"/"full" are accepted only for historical/regression frozen candidates produced before this hardening.
